packages.name: Aeotec Heavy Duty Smart Switch
packages.description: Maintained fork with bug fixes for the Aeotec Heavy Duty Smart Switch (ZW078) Z-Wave switch with power metering.

packages.name: BirdWeather PUC
packages.description: Live bird detection data from a BirdWeather PUC station, exposed as Hubitat device attributes and automation events.

packages.name: Netatmo Weather Station Connect
packages.description: A Hubitat integration for Netatmo Weather Station base stations and modules, including outdoor, indoor, rain, and wind modules.

packages.name: Rheem EcoNet
packages.description: Drivers for Rheem EcoNet thermostats and water heaters via the ClearBlade cloud API.

packages.name: Xiaomi/Aqara Temperature & Humidity Sensor
packages.description: Community fork with bug fixes for Xiaomi and Aqara Zigbee temperature and humidity sensors.
